content: Initializing Synapse event log as mandated by GEMINI.md and user feedback. Starting repository audit.
Broad repository audit in progress. Observed 113 HTML files vs 95 URLs in sitemap.xml. Investigating missing pages and broken links.
Starting implementation of audit fixes: Updating sitemap.xml with missing URLs and syncing lastmod dates.
Formalized mandate for agent communication via Synapse Bus. Updated AGENTS.md and synchronized audit fixes for SEO and encoding.
Communication via synapse.jsonl is now HARD MANDATED by GEMINI.md and AGENTS.md. All agents MUST read and log to this file.
Completed implementation of audit fixes: sitemap updated, IndexNow pinged, and temp files cleaned up. Proceeding to final verification.
